notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Canzone reaches on a fielder's choice. Julio Rodríguez to 3rd. Julio Rodríguez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Denzer Guzman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Denzer Guzman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford. Denzer Guzman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Nolan Schanuel batting, Zach Neto picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Colt Emerson.

notableEvents.label: Randy Arozarena plunked
notableEvents.detail: Randy Arozarena hit by pitch. Dominic Canzone to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Denzer Guzman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman J.P. Crawford. Denzer Guzman to 2nd.
